body:
## Purpose
To add functionality in `get_parameter_values!` to return more types

## In this PR
- types now interpreted from toml file `type="..."` with options: `"float"`, `"integer"`, or `"string"`
- `"string"` is the default if toml parameter is untyped
- only the float precision is provided when parameter struct created. Integer precision is simply inferred from the system by `Int`
## Also
- docs for API now only checks for user-facing (exported) functions
title: Add reading functionality for string and int
